summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Contact page and navigation updates for Dune Lubricants. All major features working correctly with minor phone link formatting issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Phone tel: links missing spaces in href attribute
ui_bugs.details: tel:+971503343543 should be tel:+971 50 3343543 for better compatibility

passed_tests: Contact page loads at /contact with hero section 'Contact our Engineering Command'
Address card displays correct Dune Lubricants info for Sharjah location
Email card shows info.duneoil@gmail.com with working mailto link
Website card displays duneindustries.com with external link
Google Maps embed visible and functional
View on Google Maps link opens correct location
Technical Inquiry form has all required fields (Full Name, Company Email, Inquiry Type dropdown, Phone Number, Message)
Deploy Inquiry button submits form and shows success message
CTA section displays 'Need Immediate Technical Assistance?' with Speak to Engineer button
Contact link in navbar navigates to /contact
Active nav state: Contact highlighted gold on /contact page
Homepage Global Reach section updated to 'GLOBAL HQ: SHARJAH, UAE'
Footer renders correctly on contact page
Mobile responsiveness working - form fields accessible, mobile menu functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Update phone tel: links to include spaces in href attributes for better compatibility (tel:+971 50 3343543 instead of tel:+971503343543)
